summary.intent: Fix review comments on PR #473 in the moltis repo, specifically addressing Greptile bot feedback on the whatsapp handlers.
summary.outcome: All three review comments addressed: changed warn! to info! for sticker/reaction handling, removed already-handled fields from describe_message_fields, and added 3 unit tests. All 70 tests pass, fmt and clippy clean, changes committed and pushed.

repo: Greptile bot is used for automated code review in the moltis-org/moltis repo
The whatsapp crate lives at crates/whatsapp/src/handlers.rs and has a test suite (67 tests before this session)
Work is done in superset worktrees at /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/<branch-name>/

code.finding: describe_message_fields should not list already-handled fields to avoid confusion — only unhandled/unknown fields belong there
Sticker and reaction message types are common/expected events; warn! is inappropriate, info! is correct log level

workflow: PR review comments fetched via separate gh api calls for review comments, issue comments, and reviews
After code changes: run tests, then fmt+clippy before committing — standard quality gate order in this repo
